review_notes: This entry records a reviewed release-evidence runtime acceptance summary produced on 211 for the 00e4e6b runtime subject.
The verifier confirmed safe reviewed-index export behavior and review-first retention policy acceptance with no runtime export blockers.

The inner runtime acceptance payload is a safe summary only and omits raw evidence roots, raw runtime payloads, object locators, workspace filesystem paths, executor-only internals, run identifiers, file identifiers, artifact identifiers, and personal workstation paths.

This focused evidence removes the G9 runtime export and retention acceptance blocker for the 00e4e6b Foundation Alpha POC runtime only. It does not close alert delivery enablement, signed Skill package/SBOM, ordinary-user legacy route acceptance, packaged frontend image release acceptance, broader auth/session/RBAC regression gates, or G0 source-authority parity while stale labels remain.
